business_ideas.idea: Build media brands around tight-knit communities using principles from cults, bands, soccer clubs
Sports media league focused on storytelling and community over stats and traditional metrics
Personal brand newsletter as dogfooding your own product platform (Big Desk Energy model)
Using hand signs and symbols to create in-group identity and community belonging

predictions.text: Sports media will shift from stat-driven coverage to community-driven storytelling that builds parasocial connection
Startup sports leagues can compete with established leagues by prioritizing community and culture over production value
Celebrity and influencer participation grows when content achieves cultural zeitgeist rather than being forced
